title: Intense Chocolate Polish Banana Wrap
description: A rich and adventurous Polish dish featuring fried ripe bananas and tempering chocolate, all wrapped in a lotus leaf, this dessert is sure to satisfy any sweet tooth, and is also fodmap friendly.
instructions: Fry the sliced bananas in melted butter until golden brown and set aside.
Melt the dark chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30 second increments, stirring between each interval.
Temper the melted chocolate by cooling it down to around 82 degrees Fahrenheit.
Spread a tablespoon of whipped cream cheese onto the center of each lotus leaf.
Arrange a few pieces of the fried bananas on top of the cream cheese.
Drizzle the tempered chocolate over the bananas.
Sprinkle granulated sugar, cinnamon powder, and salt over the chocolate.
Fold the lotus leaves over the filling to form a wrap.
